name: Shrine of the Four Winds
description: An ancient stone altar sits atop the highest hill in the area. Four weathered pillars surround it, each carved with symbols of the wind.

discovery.message: On a distant ridge, you see a group of ancient standing stones silhouetted against the sky.

shrine-menu.text: The wind howls steadily across the altar, carrying a faint musical resonance. The four pillars stand silent witness.

pray-shrine.text: You kneel before the altar and offer a prayer to the wind spirits.
pray-shrine.success_text: A sudden gust of wind swirls around you. You feel lighter and more energetic.
pray-shrine.failure_text: The wind remains a steady, indifferent howl.

pray-success.text: The wind spirits acknowledge your devotion.

leave-offering.text: You place five gold pieces on the altar. They glint briefly, then are gone.

shrine-leave.text: You leave the shrine to the wind.
